programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep109: Whale Sharks, Feeding Frenzies, and Great White Sharks.
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV studies Whale Sharks kept in a giant tank and then takes a Deeper Dive by explaining shark hearing, shark feeding frenzies and Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Let’s Take It Outside Ep109: Old Florida with a New Vibe…Discovering West Volusia County, Florida
programme.desc: Do you wonder what “Old Florida” is like? Discover West Volusia County with Misty as she catches the biggest Bass of her life, kayaks crystal clear springs and races across the waters chasing gators.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep313: Epic Journey Across Austrian Italian Alps by Bike and Kayak
programme.desc: Extreme kayakers Adrian Mattern and Brendan Orton pursue an ambitious goal: a journey across the Austrian and Italian Alps only by bicycle and their kayaks. In addition, we look at the challenges and the technology involved in setting up a racecourse for watersports such as kiteboarding, sailing, and stand-up paddleboarding.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Blue World Ep202: Manta Rays in Micronesia + Fish Rescue + Tiger Sharks in the Bahamas
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird travels to Micronesia to learn about Manta Rays, helps rescue tropical fish in New England and dives with Tiger Sharks in the Bahamas

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep108: West Java in Indonesia
programme.desc: A group of Australian pro junior surfers jump aboard the ‘Just Dreaming’ Indonesian charter boat and unleash some of the most hi-fi action as they push the limits of where surfing is going. Hear their thoughts regarding the competitive life, where they hope to be and what it’s like to unwind at the end of the year, while still having the competitive fires burning as they search for perfect Indonesian waves.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep108: North Pole
programme.desc: The Travel Quest crew takes an icebreaker to the North Pole just in time to make a satellite phone call to wish Bill's mother a happy birthday (she is so shocked she doesn't recognize him). We also track and film the biggest predators on earth…polar bears.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep109: Whale Sharks, Feeding Frenzies, and Great White Sharks.
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV studies Whale Sharks kept in a giant tank and then takes a Deeper Dive by explaining shark hearing, shark feeding frenzies and Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Let’s Take It Outside Ep109: Old Florida with a New Vibe…Discovering West Volusia County, Florida
programme.desc: Do you wonder what “Old Florida” is like? Discover West Volusia County with Misty as she catches the biggest Bass of her life, kayaks crystal clear springs and races across the waters chasing gators.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep313: Epic Journey Across Austrian Italian Alps by Bike and Kayak
programme.desc: Extreme kayakers Adrian Mattern and Brendan Orton pursue an ambitious goal: a journey across the Austrian and Italian Alps only by bicycle and their kayaks. In addition, we look at the challenges and the technology involved in setting up a racecourse for watersports such as kiteboarding, sailing, and stand-up paddleboarding.

programme.title: Creedlecosm
programme.desc: Volcom presents CreedleCosm, a snowboarding cinematic masterpiece. Starring Mike Rav, Scott Blum, Desiree Melancon, Egan Wint, Seb Picaro, Arthur Longo, Torgeir Bergrem, Pat Moore, Bryan Iguchi, Jadyn Chomlack, Juliette Pelchat, Estelle Pensiero, Jamie Lynn, Alec Majerus and Simon Bannerot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Crosspollution
programme.desc: High voltage shred flick from the Volcom Skateboarding and Snowboarding teams. Starring Benny Milam, Cody Warble, Reid Smith, Lenny Mazzotti, Jack Harold, Scott Blum, Christian Connors, CJ Collins, Axel Cruysberghs, Alec Majerus, Henry Gartland and Mike Ravelson. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Inexact Odyssey
programme.desc: ‘Inexact Odyssey’ is a film about unexpected adventure and endless opportunity. From the winding canyons of Zion National Park to the high alpine passes of Arlberg, Austria, filmmaker Seth Huot uses his Super-8 camera to capture spontaneous travels and impromptu sessions with the Volcom Snow team.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Tchin Tchin
programme.desc: In ‘Tchin Tchin’, the Pusher Bearings crew head to the South of France to do flip tricks and jump off cliffs. Featuring the skateboarding of Kilian Zehnder, Titi Gormit, Robin Fournier, Anto Lopez, Davide Holznecht, and Simon Perottet.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Outta Bounds
programme.desc: Thrasher Magazine and Pusher Bearings present ‘Outta Bounds,’ featuring ledges, hip-hop and skate plazas. Pusher’s international team of technicians knows the recipe. Kilian Zehnder, Nick Dias, Carlos Iqui and more bring the flow from South America to Spain.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Alive In Engadin
programme.desc: Do you like beautiful Swiss valleys? Do you like skateboarding? Yes, and yes. Watch photographer Filip Zuan and cinematographer Christian Taro spend a weekend capturing extraordinary spots with the skateboarders Christoph Rediger and Alessandro Magnani. A feast for the eyes and the senses.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Suscht Guet
programme.desc: SUSCHT GUET is a Swiss skateboard film by Shqipron Bobaj and Tomas Schneider. Featuring Aaron Ulrich, Célian Cordt-Moller, David Nideröst, Dino Brandão, Fabio Prosdocimi, Fin Broder, Flavio Zimmermann, Jànos Herzog, Jeron Breschan, Lorenzo Zuber, Oliver Weismantel, Lukas Bigun, Mike Sidi and more.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Worldly Goods
programme.desc: To celebrate the release of his collection, Louie Lopez spent a week stacking clips between breezy San Francisco and blazing hot Sacramento with a crew of his longtime Volcom teammates; Alec Majerus, Collin Provost, Amos Wilton and Simon Bannerot. Filmed by Ryan Lee, Taylor Phillips and Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Vitals
programme.desc: The Volcom Skate Team putting their latest Vitals Collection to the test in the streets of Los Angeles, California. Featuring Louie Lopez, Collin Provost, Grant Taylor, Axel Cruysberghs, CJ Collins and Chris Pfanner. Filmed by Ryan Lee and Calvin Millar. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Que Saguaro
programme.desc: In ‘Que Saguaro’, Volcom charges through the spillways and street spots of the Southwestern U.S. with Milton Martinez, Collin Provost, Omar Hassan, Mathias Torres, Alec Majerus, Simon Bannerot, CJ Collins, Peter Hewitt, Remy Stratton, Tom Remmilard, Jarrod Pimental, Jaime Lynn and Scott Blum.

programme.title: Missle 3
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: The Olin Sisters - Pachamama
programme.desc: A sun-drenched short film about soul, surf and sisterhood. Pachamama follows Mathea and Sanoa Olin’s journey to become professional surfers in the harsh coldwater waves off the west coast of Canada. Filmed by director Ross Allen during The Rip Curl Pro Tofino.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Happy Recluse
programme.desc: For many years Pete Devries and Jeremy Koreski have been on a mission to surf the best waves Vancouver Island has to offer. In particular, they return again and over to a wave with potential for a legendary session. In the process, Pete tells of his life as a ”Happy Recluse," at home in cold water.

programme.title: Roxy Presents: New Colors
programme.desc: Faced with the winter waters of Norway, four female professional surfers step out of their comfort zone, push their boundaries and redefine their approach to surfing. Beyond competition sites, they reconnect with the pleasure of sharing their passion through a unique cold water experience.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: Kaiwi Winds
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche GT3 RS bears a very special wing on its back. Also: the Mercedes-AMG GT S provides understatement and power at the same time. And: the even more uncompromising Radical RX C Turbo.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged are big and have a lot of power, so that they could even take on sports cars. Also: with the Bentayga, Bentley presented the brand's first SUV model. And: the Jaguar F-Pace.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German manufacturer Roding created a car that even outshined the Porsche GT3 with an impressive power/weight ratio. British makes like the Caterham 620 R, Lotus Elise or Radical RXC also showed what's in play in regards to lightweight sports cars.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 13
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: Weekend Killer

Joey struggles to keep himself together as the investigation leads him closer and closer to the deranged killer!

programme.title: The Faith Community

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E12 - The New Royals
programme.desc: Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie have gone through a lot of media attention and tough situations in their lives. From their parents' very public split to being targeted by the press, they've been through quite a bit. Despite all this, they remain dedicated to supporting the monarchy with their charity work. Through serving the Commonwealth, both sisters continue to make a positive impact.

programme.title: When God Says Let Go
programme.desc: Is your faith being tested? If you’ve been waiting on the details of what God has next, remember that God doesn’t give a test without a lesson first, so if He’s calling you to let go of something, you can trust He’s already provided you with what you’ll need to take that step.

programme.title: This Might Be My God Moment
programme.desc: Are you standing over a situation that’s too big for you? If you feel like your hope, logic, and options are at a dead end, pay attention because this might be your “my God moment.”

programme.title: All Those Times You Didn’t See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one’s watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn’t mean He’s ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don’t have what it takes, and we don’t know what to do. But don’t be afraid or discouraged, because God isn’t late — He’s working according to His timing. Don’t lose hope, and don’t give up

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: After a phone call, Pastora says that Clara Inés will go to prison for being an impostor, Elisenda is surprised by the news.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Berenice claims Israel never loved her enough; the overwhelmed woman decrees that she hates her father for destroying her life.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raúl, César Román and Francesca reconstruct the attack against Azalea, they come to the conclusion that the knife is the one left by Nacho at Francesca's house.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul makes it clear to Santiago that they are not celebrating, but when he sees that Adriana is accompanying the lawyer, he cannot control his jealousy.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel receives a note from El Doliente, anticipating his death. The plan against Rosa Blanco failed. She continues to relate the events of the past; Ezequiel, forcing her to take the murder weapon, managed to get her to be blamed for this murder, for which she paid so many years of unjust imprisonment.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel tries to abuse Camila, a gloved hand hits him. Everyone blames Camila and she defends herself saying she did not see the murderer. Torrealba insists on interrogating her. Everyone: Octavia, Astrid, Max, Marcelina, Leandro, Gregorio and even Sebastián had motives to kill Ezequiel. Only Max is arrested, as the presumed perpetrator of the crime.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Because the only way to forget Nicolás is to marry Sergio, Victoria asks her future husband to prepare the wedding for the next day. On a new day, Eugenia unburdens herself with Nicolás, because she does not understand how the person she thought could make her happy is now the one who hurts her the most; when Victoria contacts Sergio to tell him that she is ready to go to the headquarters, Nicolás takes his beloved in his arms to take her away. Despite Victoria's efforts to escape from a smitten Nicolas who has kidnapped her to prove his love, Victoria does not manage to escape; Nicolas challenges his beloved to contact Sergio to inform him of her whereabouts. For his part, Sergio approaches Clementina, who - seeing that Victoria is not with Sergio - assumes that her friend has decided to escape from the mistake she was about to make by marrying a man she does not love.

programme.title: EFECTO TN
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: DRIVING
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: CULTURA DJ
programme.desc: Programa que celebra la diversidad y la riqueza de la cultura musical a través del arte del DJing

programme.title: MAGAZINE CENTRAL
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: DEBATE INMOBILIARIO
programme.desc: Programa que promueve el análisis y la discusión de temas variados

programme.title: ESTILO PUNTA
programme.desc: Programa que promueve el análisis y la discusión de temas variados

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Juego del Sexo
programme.desc: Un alienígena cambiante procedente del espacio exterior causa estragos en un pequeño pueblo rural del suroeste de Estados Unidos, cerca del legendario Área 51 de fama ovni. Estos extraterrestres son una raza devoradora de cerebros a quienes les encanta decapitar y comerse a los humanos. Están entre nosotros y lo han estado durante millones de años.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: 4 Metros
programme.desc: 4 METROS relata, en tono de comedia romántica, la historia de un hombre entrando en la crisis de los 40. Joaquín tiene un zumbido en los oídos y poco sabe de sí mismo. Se ha dejado llevar sin intervenir demasiado en sus deseos. No escucha su voz interior. Su vida afectiva y laboral no tienen rumbo. El zumbido quizá sea la expresión, no asumida ni entendida todavía, de un ruido metafórico de la vida gritándole por dónde ir. Su novia tiene 20 años menos, aparece la presión social y familiar sobre la paternidad, sentirse útil, la vocación, el trabajo y cómo ser feliz. Hasta que otra mujer irrumpe y todo parece acomodarse. Pero siempre el orden debe ser interno. Así, como si el destino tomara la palabra, su vida cambiará 4 metros abajo del agua, donde aparece un sendero para encontrar la identidad.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Baile Peligroso
programme.desc: Miluska es una cantante, que se gana la vida haciendo shows musicales para un hotel turístico en el sur de Perú. Durante las presentaciones conoce una variedad de empresarios de todo nivel, entre ellos está Don Mauro, un señor respetable, que admira mucho a Miluska, Carlos Reyes, un traficante de mujeres que se hace pasar por empresario. Al ser cliente frecuente del hotel se gana cierta confianza con las chicas, un día le ofrece a Miluska hacer un show para su hotel en otra provincia, pero no sabían que caerían en una trampa difícil de escapar.

programme.title: Codón Es Una Máquina
programme.desc: Dos amigos se reúnen para planear la creación de una película con un equipo de producción filmando el proceso, dos cuarentones con problemitas están muy decididos a hacer la famosa película de la que llevan años hablando. Se vienen tan arriba que hasta ya graban el making of... y hasta están haciendo un casting, aunque no tienen ni guión ni puñetera idea de lo que van a rodar. Y lo peor: no sospechan que están en las manos de un loco peligroso.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
